Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 33 

PATIENT_ETHNICITY 

LABEL: Patient's Ethnicity 

DESCRIPTION: Patient's ethnicity. 

SHORT NAME: PATIENT_ETHNICITY 

LONG NAME: PATIENT_ETHNICITY 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 

FILE(S): Demographic 
Alignment (final and EVAA cycle files) 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: 2135-2 = Hispanic or Latino 
2186-5 = Not Hispanic or Latino
